---
title: "Quarto Test Document"
author: "OpenClaw Assistant"
date: "2026-03-24"
format: html
---

## Welcome to Quarto

This is a test document to verify the Quarto installation is working correctly.

### Features Tested

- **Markdown rendering**: Basic text formatting works
- **Code chunks**: Execute code inline
- **HTML output**: Render to HTML format

### R Code Example

```r
# Simple R code chunk
x <- 1:10
mean(x)
```

### Python Code Example

```python
# Simple Python code chunk
import numpy as np
data = np.arange(1, 11)
print(f"Mean: {data.mean()}")
```

## Conclusion

If this renders successfully, Quarto is fully operational!

---
*Generated on {{< meta date >}}*
